title: WhatsApp Groups
description: One session, multiple groups, visible rules. Configure anti-links, welcome messages, and warnings without leaving the page.
rule_antilinks_text: Blocks off-topic links before they pollute the discussion.
rule_welcome_text: Sends a welcome message once a day at the end of the day.
rule_warnings_text: Warns before sanctioning for clear moderation.
info_banner: Whappi applies rules only in groups where the WhatsApp session is an admin.
empty_no_sessions_text: Start by creating a WhatsApp session before configuring your groups.
empty_no_connection_text: Reconnect a session to read groups and apply rules.
empty_no_groups_text: Add the session to a WhatsApp group, give it admin role, then come back here.
presets_desc: Starting point adapted to your community type. You can modify each rule afterwards.
preset_professionnel_forbidden: scam, spam, betting, fast crypto, telegram link
preset_professionnel_warning: @{{name}} message deleted: {{reason}}. {{remaining}} warning(s) left before group exclusion.
preset_education_welcome: Welcome new learners. Please review the guidelines, stay on topic, and keep questions clear.
preset_education_warning: @{{name}} message deleted: {{reason}}. {{remaining}} warning(s) left before group exclusion.
preset_tontine_warning: @{{name}} message deleted: {{reason}}. {{remaining}} warning(s) left before group exclusion.
preset_suivi_client_forbidden: scam, spam, insults, off-topic, competitor link
preset_suivi_client_welcome: Welcome new clients arriving today. Please include your order number, request, and expected deadline.
preset_suivi_client_warning: @{{name}} message deleted: {{reason}}. {{remaining}} warning(s) left before client follow-up group exclusion.
scheduled_message_desc: Schedule an announcement, payment reminder, follow-up, or recurring message.
scheduled_message_placeholder: e.g. Reminder: please confirm your attendance before 6 PM.
warned_members_empty: No warned members for this group.
calendar_empty: No scheduled messages for this group.
rule_forbidden_text: Add words or expressions to block. Enter or comma validates each word.
rule_welcome_switch_text: Send a clear recap once a day at the end of the day.
rule_warning_switch_text: Delete the message, then tag the member with a warning.
rule_exclusion_desc: If disabled, Whappi only warns and tags. If enabled, it kicks at the chosen threshold.
default_welcome_message: Welcome to new members arriving today. Please respect the topic, avoid off-topic links, and keep exchanges useful.
default_warning_message: @{{name}} your message has been deleted: {{reason}}. Please respect the group rules.
active_rule_zero: No active rules for this group
